title: Command Cockpit Quest Tile Compression
summary: Compressed the default quest hero tile inside the Command Cockpit Overview module so the first selected-lane module feels like a dense game card.
proof: Added tested Command Cockpit CSS that tightens Quest cockpit gap, padding, hero grid, portrait size, meter size, and hero copy clamp.
Kept the compression scoped to the Command Cockpit so the full Quest cockpit keeps its existing richer spacing elsewhere.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the Quest tile compression unlock.
